text-block-1.title: Service Injection in the Matrix
text-block-1.text:
OSGi Declarative Services (DS) provides a powerful annotation-based approach to dependency injection. Instead of manually wiring components together, you simply declare what you need, and the OSGi runtime handles the rest.

It's like having the ability to download any skill directly into your consciousness - just declare the dependency and it's there when you need it.

code-block-1.title: Declarative Services Component

text-block-2.title: Key Annotations
text-block-2.text:
• @Component - Marks a class as an OSGi component
  • @Reference - Injects service dependencies
  • @Activate - Called when component is activated
  • @Deactivate - Called when component is deactivated
  • @Modified - Called when configuration changes
  • @Designate - Links configuration interface
